# gf180mcu_ocd_ip_sram 1024x8 Macro

This directory contains layout and timing views for:

```text
gf180mcu_ocd_ip_sram__sram1024x8m8wm1
```

Source:

```text
https://github.com/RTimothyEdwards/gf180mcu_ocd_ip_sram/tree/main/cells/gf180mcu_ocd_ip_sram__sram1024x8m8wm1
```

The files are used by the OpenLane2 sequential CNN bring-up config in:

```text
openlane/cnn_top_multichannel_serial/config.yaml
```

The downloaded LEF reports:

```text
SIZE 301.300 BY 515.810 ;
```
